codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly adds an explicit 'Refresh' action to the mounted shell, enabling users to re-fetch bootstrap data and trigger silent renewal without a full page reload or WS reconnect. The implementation appropriately relies on the existing `fetchWithRenewal` helper, maintaining the auth contract via `GET /auth/session` without introducing any new or bypass auth flows. It correctly handles successful renewal by keeping the shell stable and handles complete renewal failure by dispatching `authexpired` to fall back cleanly to the guest auth state. Tests thoroughly cover all newly introduced expected behaviors.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker appropriately created a new `.factory/library/frontend-mounted-shell-renewal.md` document to record the behavior and design of the follow-up feature, keeping the shared knowledge base up-to-date.

summary: Review passes. The mounted-shell refresh feature accurately satisfies all expected behavior requirements using the established `fetchWithRenewal` method.
